name: Relative time
goal: Display the age of an ISO timestamp as an auto-updating relative phrase (e.g. '2 minutes ago').
description: Renders a semantic <time datetime='...'> element whose text content is the difference between the supplied datetime and now, formatted via Intl.RelativeTimeFormat with the largest sensible unit (seconds → minutes → hours → days → months → years). Self-rescheduling: it ticks every second while under a minute old, every 30 seconds while under an hour, then larger steps to keep CPU and battery low for older items.

props.name: datetime
props.description: ISO 8601 timestamp; an empty / unparseable value renders empty text.

props.name: locale
props.description: BCP-47 locale tag for Intl formatting; defaults to the document locale.

props.name: numeric
props.description: Auto allows phrases like 'yesterday' / 'tomorrow'; always forces numeric forms like '1 day ago'.

props.name: tickMs
props.description: Override the auto-scheduled refresh interval (0 = use the unit-aware default).

sideEffects.description: Schedules a setTimeout that re-renders at a unit-appropriate cadence.
sideEffects.reason: The displayed phrase needs to refresh as wall-clock time advances.
